name: slot-art-creator-node-mcp
description: Node.js MCP server for slot-art-creator — exposes seven tools across two model families. NB2 family (Gemini/fal.ai): nb2_generate, nb2_edit, nb2_upscale, nb2_smart_resize. GPT Image 2 family (OpenAI): gpt2_generate, gpt2_edit. Plus the cross-family nb2_stage_image helper (copies external/chat-attached images into the safe inputs folder so they can be used by any tool). NB2 keys and OpenAI key are independent — set whichever you need.
